text:
soooo... a new age type wii basically.
can you play games with other ppl in different households? can they link like that?

所以……基本上是新时代的Wii。

text: I honestly agree… it looks so so cool.

text: All the people that came to the comments just to talk about how crazy the price is when you are just trying to inform parents of awesome new gift ideas for your kids/families to do together is WILD behavior. If you don’t like the price.. keep scrolling and don’t buy it 😂 these are probably the same parents spending $100 on new shows for their child but god forbid they spend a couple hundred for countless memories with their kids! Some of us want to thank you for sharing! 🤗
text_zh: 所有来评论区只是为了抱怨价格有多离谱，而你们明明只是想告诉家长们有哪些很棒的新礼物给孩子/家人一起玩，这种行为简直太疯狂了。如果你不喜欢这个价格.. 接着刷下去，别买就行了 😂 这些父母估计是那种花100美元给孩子买新剧的孩子，但他们绝对不能忍受花几百美元和孩子创造无数回忆！我们当中有些人要感谢你的分享！🤗

text_zh: 太好了，谢谢！

text: Wait wait wait. What is this contraption you have your tv attached to?! I want to be able to move my tv like that!
text_zh: 等等等等。你电视上连的是什么鬼东西？！我想让我的电视也这么移动！

text: Such a good idea
text_zh: 真是个好主意

text: Why do I want this as an adult tho haha
text_zh: 为什么我一个成年人想要这个啊哈哈

text: I got one for my son’s bday in January. Paid for the yearly package too. It’s definitely fun and would probably be even better if you have multiple children!
text_zh: 我一月份给我儿子生日买了一个，还付费了年套餐。确实挺好玩的，如果有好几个孩子一起玩可能效果更好！

text: I need it for my son asap
text_zh: 我得赶紧给我儿子买一个

text: I will get one for my kid🥰
text_zh: 我会给我孩子买一个的🥰

text: Maam I thought you were lifting that tv with barely any effort 😂😂
text_zh: 女士，我以为你没怎么费力就在抬那个电视呢😂😂😂

text: That’s an awesome idea 💡
text_zh: 这想法太棒了 💡

text: Oh this is fun!! Great idea
text_zh: 哦，这个真有意思！！绝妙的主意

text: So fun!!!
text_zh: 太好玩了！！！

text: Love it
text_zh: 爱了

text: I want that tv mount. 😳
text_zh: 我想要那个电视支架。😳

text: What is thisss wow!
text_zh: 这是啥啊，哇！

text: Fine… I’ll buy it
text_zh: 好吧…我买了

text: I want one!
text_zh: 我想要一个！

text: I really want to get that this year!!
text_zh: 我真的想今年就买！

text: We love it!!
text_zh: 我们很喜欢！！

text: I’m getting this!!
text_zh: 我要买了！！
